candidates.why: Direct cost line and best match for COGS; preferred over duplicate synonym rows.

candidates.row_label: Finished goods and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory asset, not COGS expense.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit COGS line. 'Cost of revenues/COGS' appears duplicate by values, so excluded to avoid duplicate mapping.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component above operating profit.
Subcomponent of Selling expenses; prefer parent component row over nested subcomponent to avoid partial/double counting.
Clear SG&A component above operating profit.
Subcomponent of Administrative expenses; prefer parent component row over nested subcomponent to avoid partial/double counting.
Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; include in XSGA so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Subcomponent of R&D expenses; avoid if using parent R&D line.
Mostly empty bucket; less reliable than populated lowercase row.
Operating overhead bucket above operating profit; include as additional overhead component.
Supplemental personnel disclosure that likely overlaps with selling/admin; avoid double counting.
Depreciation should be excluded from XSGA per rules.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet asset gross amount, not SG&A expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset/amortization, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected the main operating overhead components above operating profit. Included 'R&D expenses' as required so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D. Excluded depreciation/amortization lines and subcomponents to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line.
